# @agent-os/workspace-env Public API

Status: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are limited to WorkspaceEnv types, normalization helpers, and standard workspace tool generator.

## Public exports

- `.:CreateWorkspaceEnvOptions`
- `.:CreateWorkspaceToolsOptions`
- `.:WorkspaceDeletePathResult`
- `.:WorkspaceEnv`

- `.:WorkspaceReadFileResult`
- `.:WorkspaceRunShellResult`
- `.:WorkspaceToolDeleteHookInput`
- `.:WorkspaceToolExecHookInput`
- `.:WorkspaceToolEnvRef`
- `.:WorkspaceToolHooks`
- `.:WorkspaceToolWriteHookInput`
- `.:WorkspaceWriteFileResult`
- `.:createWorkspaceEnv`
- `.:createWorkspaceTools`
